name: Indian Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour milk into a saucepan and bring to a boil.
2. In a separate bowl, mix corn meal with cold water until well combined.
3. Gradually stir the wet corn meal mixture into the boiling milk, then add salt and chopped suet. Continue stirring over low heat for 15 minutes.
4. Finely chop the suet, removing all skin.
5. Remove from heat, stir in 1/2 cup cold milk, brown sugar, molasses, baking soda mixed with molasses, cinnamon, nutmeg, and ginger.
6. Beat egg yolks until smooth, then fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites.
7. Grease a 2-quart baking dish and pour in the batter.
8. Bake in a preheated oven for one hour or until set.
9. Allow to cool slightly before serving with cream.
